chunks.text: If you are in class 5, then you should also know what is an operator  If you are watching this video on the 4th class, then listen  Addition is 15 plus 7  Add the numbers  You have taken 15 rupees, you have taken 7 rupees, how much money will you take to store?

chunks.text: 21 rupees, no, wrong answer, 22 rupees  Okay, listen carefully  15 plus 7 is 22  Similarly, 15 minus 7 is 9, wrong answer, 8 is ok  So keep in mind

chunks.text: So these are all operators  Jockey, addition, subtraction, multiplication  Now I have shown you the wrong exponential operator  It is a division  I will correct it
